---
title: "RSVP"
back-to-top-navigation: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::::: rsvp-page
::: rsvp-intro
We can't wait to celebrate with you.
:::

<p class="rsvp-note">

Please RSVP by <strong>June 1, 2027</strong> so we can finalize seating and catering. If you have any questions in the meantime, reach out any time — details on our <a href="content/faqs.qmd">FAQs</a> page.

</p>

::: rsvp-form-wrapper
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/YOUR_FORM_ID/viewform?embedded=true" loading="lazy">

Loading…

</iframe>
:::

<p class="rsvp-fallback">

Having trouble with the form above? You can also <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/YOUR_FORM_ID/viewform" target="_blank">open it in a new tab</a>.

</p>
:::::
